status.description: Phase filter: 'all' (default) or comma-separated phase names. The pseudo-token 'ACTIVE' expands to all non-terminal phases. Blank input, empty tokens (e.g. 'COMPLETED,,FAILED'), or unknown phase names return HTTP 400.

size.description: Max number of results (default: 50; values above the internal max of 500 are silently clamped; size <= 0 returns HTTP 400)
